mapper.select:
SELECT R.ID, R.RSV_NO, R.RSV_TITLE, R.VD_CD, R.VD_NM, TO_CHAR(R.APPLY_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPLY_DT, R.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, R.REG_ID FROM IP_PRICE_RSV R LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='IP_RSV_STS' AND S.CD=R.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE R.DEL_YN='N'
AND (R.RSV_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR R.RSV_TITLE LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR R.VD_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND R.STS=#{sts} ORDER BY R.ID DESC

SELECT R.ID, R.COMP_CD, R.RSV_NO, R.RSV_TITLE, R.VD_CD, R.VD_NM, R.CHRG_USR_ID, TO_CHAR(R.APPLY_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPLY_DT, R.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, R.REMARK, R.REG_ID FROM IP_PRICE_RSV R LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='IP_RSV_STS' AND S.CD=R.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE R.ID=#{id} AND R.DEL_YN='N'

SELECT ID, RSV_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, UNIT_CD, TO_CHAR(APPLY_SD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPLY_SD, TO_CHAR(APPLY_ED,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPLY_ED, UNIT_PRC, REMARK FROM IP_PRICE_RSV_LINE WHERE RSV_ID=#{rsvId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IP_PRICE_RSV (COMP_CD, RSV_NO, RSV_TITLE, VD_CD, VD_NM, CHRG_USR_ID, APPLY_DT, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{rsvNo}, #{rsvTitle}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, #{chrgUsrId}, TO_DATE(#{applyDt},'YYYY-MM-DD'), NVL(#{sts},'TMP'), #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE IP_PRICE_RSV SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE IP_PRICE_RSV SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IP_PRICE_RSV_LINE (RSV_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, UNIT_CD, APPLY_SD, APPLY_ED, UNIT_PRC, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{rsvId}, #{lineNo}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{unitCd}, TO_DATE(#{applySd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{applyEd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), NVL(#{unitPrc},0), #{remark}, 'SYSTEM')
